channel.title: Prevent useArchiveInfiniteScroll from changing URL
channel.description:
Hello.
I am currently implementing useArchiveInfiniteScroll but I would like to not replace the link when scrolling through the list of posts.
Currently, when scrolling and getting to the second page of the archive, the page links changes to "domain-test.com/blog/page/2".
Can this behaviour be prevented?
Thank you! :)

item.title: Prevent useArchiveInfiniteScroll from changing URL
item.dc:creator: radu
item.description:
Hello.

I am currently implementing useArchiveInfiniteScroll but I would like to not replace the link when scrolling through the list of posts.

Currently, when scrolling and getting to the second page of the archive, the page links changes to “domain-test.com/blog/page/2”.

Can this behaviour be prevented?

Thank you!

Read full topic
